title: [MTR4] Mark5a Caledonian Sleeper Coaches
description: Caledonian Sleeper Mark5a Coaches for Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
# Overview
![full Caledonian Sleeper Mark5a Coaches set](https://i.imgur.com/IRY3bia.png)
The British Rail Mark 5A is a type of locomotive-hauled passenger carriage built between 2018 and 2019 by Construcciones y Auxiliar de Ferrocarriles (CAF) in Beasain, Spain. Designed for modern intercity travel in the UK, the Mark 5A offers high levels of passenger comfort, accessibility, and safety. With a maximum operating speed of 100 mph (160 km/h), these coaches are used by Caledonian Sleeper for overnight sleeper train services between London and Scotland, in the United Kingdom.

This resource pack adds the BR Mark 5A into Minecraft using the Minecraft Transit Railway mod. The original model was made by cw_315 for Transport Fever 2, the repaint for the Caledonian Sleeper Livery was made by Mezzie on Steam Workshop and the model was ported to Minecraft by Vitor2005 in 2025. It is compatible with MTR4.

# Disclaimer
This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, Caledonian Sleeper, CAF, British Rail, Transport Fever 2, the Minecraft Transit Railway mod, Mezzie or cw_315.
